rows.notes: P37 should codify hygiene and no-merge policy for the closed mechanism-reentry wave without changing scientific stage.
P37 should make the worktree policy, large-artifact policy, and commit cadence explicit for this wave.
The clean worktree should enforce raw-row ignore rules and keep tracked artifacts under the roughly 10 MiB default limit.
Shared control docs should expose P37 as the current low-priority wave and keep no-merge posture explicit.
